prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-TTX-GLOWTAPE-16FT-YLW Product Type: ADHESIVE_TAPES Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Weatherproof Waterproof Multi Surface Fluorescent Glow in the Dark Tape, Yellow (1 Inch Width x 16ft Long) Description: The ultimate solution for visibility and safety in dark or low light environments is the reliable glow in the dark tape from ToolTreaux. Ideal for various applications such as light switches, remote controls, sockets, locks, flashlights, door handles, as labels, to mark outdoor gear, stairways or pathways, other home essentials items and much more!

This weatherproof and waterproof tape is designed to stick to almost any clean surface, offering enhanced visibility wherever you need it most. With its long lasting glow and durable construction, it can withstand rain, snow and extreme temperatures. This glow in the dark tape ensures secure and permanent attachment with engineered pressure sensitive adhesive; here’s how to use it:

Usage Instructions:

1. Surface Preparation: Clean and dry the surface thoroughly before application

2. Cutting and Application: Cut the tape to the desired length and firmly press it onto the surface

3. Activation: Expose the tape to light for at least 1 hour to activate the glow effect

ToolTreaux’s fluorescent tape glows for approximately four hours with previous one hour exposure to a light source. Glow in the dark tape is suitable for indoor and outdoor, residential, commercial or industrial use.

NOTE: Avoid using on dirty surfaces, peeling or cracked walls, or surfaces with impurities, as this may affect adhesion and performance Search Terms: (none) Features: - GLOW IN THE DARK TAPE: Provide illumination in dark or low light environments, making it ideal for various applications such as switches, remote controls, sockets, locks, flashlights, door handles, as labels, to mark outdoor gear, stairways, items at home and much more - WATERPROOF & WEATHERPROOF: Suitable for indoor and outdoor, residential, commercial or industrial use, this glow in the dark tape ensures secure and permanent attachment with engineered pressure sensitive adhesive; Glows up to four hours after exposure to light - HOW TO USE: Clean and dry the surface thoroughly before application; Cut the tape to the desired length and firmly press it onto the surface; Expose the tape to light for at least 1 hour to activate the glow effect - MULTIDISCIPLINARY TOOL: Glow in the dark can be included in a jobsite toolbox or construction site, with camping gear, survival kits or emergency supplies, RVs, garages, workshops and more to help with quick recognition of items or spaces in dark environments - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 1 inch width x 16 feet length; Color: Yellow; Material: Polyethylene Terephthalate; Instruction manual included === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 16ft Yellow Glow in the Dark Tape

openai.item_name: ToolTreaux 1-In x 16-Ft Yellow Glow in the Dark Tape

anthropic.title_differentiation: Waterproof And Weatherproof, 4-Hour Glow, Multi-Surface Adhesive, Indoor And Outdoor Use

openai.title_differentiation: Waterproof Weatherproof Adhesive, Glows Up To 4 Hours, Multi Surface, Indoor Outdoor, 1 Inch X 16 Foot Roll
